'''kadhuju''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Nouns|noun]] meaning "[[Wikt:pygopid|pygopid]] (auto-generated)". It has inherent '''child''' gender.

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| k-dh-j
|-
! Word class
| [[Noun]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:pygopid|pygopid]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Inherent gender
| child
|-
! Citation form
| kadhuju
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || kædhijith || kædhijij || kædhijish || kædhiji
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || kadhudhujuth || kadhudhujuj || kadhudhujush || kadhudhuju
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || kadhujuth || kadhujuj || kadhujush || kadhuju
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || kadhufjufth || kadhufjufj || kadhufjufsh || kadhufjuf
|}

''16 forms generated.''

== Case paradigm ==
''Shown for child singular.''
{| class="wikitable"
! Case !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[Agent]] || kadhujuthu || kadhujuju || kadhujushu || kadhujuku
|-
| [[Patient]] || kadhujuth || kadhujuj || kadhujush || kadhuju
|-
| [[Possessive]] || kadhujuthul || kadhujujul || kadhujushul || kadhujukul
|-
| [[Instrumental]] || kadhujuuthuthu || kadhujuujuju || kadhujuushushu || kadhujuuku
|-
| [[Dative]] || kadhujuthun || kadhujujun || kadhujushun || kadhujukun
|-
| [[Speaker]] || kadhujuthuoro || kadhujujuoro || kadhujushuoro || kadhujukuoro
|}

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki child nouns]]
[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
[[Category:Words c2e237e]]
{{wordpage|d176386}}
